name: 45_Product_Recommendation_MatrixFactorization_AmazonReviews_ML
query: Je, unaweza kunisaidia kuanzisha mfumo wa mapendekezo ya bidhaa kwa kutumia algorithimu ya matrix factorization na sehemu ndogo ya Elektroniki ya seti ya data ya Amazon Reviews 2023? Unapaswa kushughulikia upakiaji wa data na usindikaji wote wa data, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa kelele na kuweka kawaida katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tumia mfano wa latent factor kuhesabu mwingiliano wa mtumiaji-bidhaa na uhifadhi utekelezaji katika `src/model.py`. Chapisha na uhifadhi matokeo ya mapendekezo katika `results/recommendation_results.txt`. Kisha onyesha mapendekezo haya kwa kutumia maktaba ya Plotly na uhifadhi taswira kama `results/figures/recommendation_visualization.html`. Mwishowe, tengeneza ripoti ya uchambuzi inayohusu usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya mfano, na matokeo, inapaswa kuhifadhiwa kama `results/recommendation_report.md`.

requirements.criteria: Sehemu ndogo ya "Electronics" ya seti ya data ya "Amazon Reviews 2023" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usindikaji wa data unafanywa, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa kelele na kuweka kawaida katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Mfano wa "Latent Factor" wa kuhesabu mwingiliano wa mtumiaji-bidhaa unatekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.
Matokeo ya mapendekezo yanaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "Plotly" na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/recommendation_visualization.html`.
Ripoti ya uchambuzi inayojumuisha usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya mfano, na matokeo ya mapendekezo inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/recommendation_report.md`.

preferences.criteria: Athari za hatua tofauti za usindikaji wa awali kwenye usahihi wa mapendekezo zinapaswa kujadiliwa katika ripoti ya uchambuzi.
Taswira inapaswa kuwa ya mwingiliano, ikiruhusu watumiaji kuchunguza matokeo ya mapendekezo kwa bidhaa tofauti.
Mfumo unapaswa kubuniwa ili kuingiza kwa urahisi data ya ziada ya tabia ya mtumiaji au vipengele vya bidhaa kwa maboresho ya baadaye.

judge_stats.criteria: Sehemu ndogo ya "Electronics" ya seti ya data ya "Amazon Reviews 2023" inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually load the "Electronics" subset of the "Amazon Reviews 2023" dataset. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` without any real data loading logic. There is no use of any dataset library (e.g., `datasets`, `pandas`, `requests`), no actual download or access of the Amazon Reviews 2023 dataset, and no filtering for the "Electronics" subset. The keywords "Amazon Reviews 2023" and "Electronics" appear only in a `KEYWORDS` list and `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` strings — not in functional code.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa data unafanywa, ikiwa ni pamoja na kuondoa kelele na kuweka kawaida katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a minimal placeholder implementation. The `load_dataset()` function simply returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` with no actual data loading logic. The `build_transforms()` function returns a static list `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]` — these are just strings, not actual preprocessing operations. There is no real noise removal, normalization, or any data preprocessing pipeline implemented. The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" and contains no functional code that processes the Amazon Reviews dataset.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa "Latent Factor" wa kuhesabu mwingiliano wa mtumiaji-bidhaa unatekelezwa katika `src/model.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not implement a real "Latent Factor model." Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with metadata strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a `build_model()` function that returns a string `"model placeholder"`. There is no actual matrix factorization logic, no user/item embedding matrices, no training procedure, and no computation of user-item interactions. The file explicitly describes itself as a "minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging," confirming it is not a genuine Latent Factor model implementation.

<UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/recommendation_results.txt` exists in the project structure, but its content is just a placeholder string `('placeholder\r\n', None)` rather than actual recommendation results. This indicates the file was created but not populated with real recommendation output from the matrix factorization model.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya mapendekezo yanaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "Plotly" na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/recommendation_visualization.html`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/figures/recommendation_visualization.html` exists in the project structure, but its content is `('', None)` — indicating it is empty or was not properly generated. Therefore, the requirement to display recommendation results using Plotly and save them as a proper HTML file has not been fulfilled.
